productDisplayName: Puma Women Large Logo Purple Tshirts
description: Composition Purple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, mega sleeves, embroidered cat logo behind the collar, stitch detailing on the side seams and brand name graphic on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Cool iron Do not dry clean Wash and iron inside out Use detergent for colours Take urban dressing to the next level with this purple t-shirt from puma. The brand logo graphic on the front gives an interesting edge to the tee. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes and a white hoodie for cool street style. Model Statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
